# SoftUI

> A neumorphic CSS component library with 77+ components, dark mode, and zero dependencies.

SoftUI provides soft shadows, muted palettes, and tactile depth for modern web interfaces. Pure CSS with optional vanilla JavaScript for interactive components. No build tools required ‚Äî just link the CSS and optionally the JS file.

## Quick Start

Install via npm:
```
npm install softui-css
```

Or use the CDN:
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/softui-css/dist/softui.min.css">
<script src="https://unpkg.com/softui-css/dist/softui.min.js"></script>
```

All classes use the `sui-` prefix (e.g. `sui-btn`, `sui-card`, `sui-modal`).

## Links

- Documentation: https://softui-css.netlify.app
- Getting Started: https://softui-css.netlify.app/getting-started/
- Playground: https://softui-css.netlify.app/playground/
- Theming Guide: https://softui-css.netlify.app/theming/
- Changelog: https://softui-css.netlify.app/changelog/
- RTL Demo: https://softui-css.netlify.app/rtl-demo/
- Live Demo App: https://softui-demo.netlify.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/siddharth-bhansali/softui
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/softui-css

## Features

- 77+ components with neumorphic styling
- Dark mode via `data-theme="dark"` on the html element
- CSS custom properties for full theming (--sui-primary, --sui-bg, --sui-radius, etc.)
- RTL support via CSS logical properties and dir="rtl" overrides
- Responsive 12-column grid with sm/md/lg/xl breakpoints
- Accessibility: prefers-reduced-motion, focus-visible, ARIA, WCAG AA contrast
- Print styles included
- Zero dependencies ‚Äî pure CSS + vanilla JS
- Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, Next.js, or plain HTML
- Design tokens available at dist/tokens.json

## Components

### Forms
- Inputs (`sui-input`, `sui-label`, `sui-form-group`, `sui-select`) ‚Äî text, email, password, number, tags, textarea, validation states, sizes
- Toggles & Checks (`sui-toggle`, `sui-checkbox`, `sui-radio`) ‚Äî switches, checkboxes, radios, colors, sizes, radio cards, checkbox cards
- Slider (`sui-range`) ‚Äî range input with labels, colors, sizes, vertical
- Color Picker (`sui-color-swatch`, `sui-color-spectrum`) ‚Äî swatches, spectrum picker with hue/hex/RGB
- Rating (`sui-rating`) ‚Äî star/heart/custom icons, half-star, sizes, read-only
- File Upload (`sui-dropzone`) ‚Äî drag-and-drop, file list, progress, image previews
- Input OTP (`sui-otp`) ‚Äî one-time password digit boxes, auto-focus advance
- Combobox (`sui-combobox`) ‚Äî searchable select/autocomplete
- Calendar (`sui-calendar`, `sui-datepicker`) ‚Äî month grid, single/range selection, date picker popover, time picker
- Segmented Control (`sui-segmented`) ‚Äî iOS-style toggle with sliding indicator, primary, block, sizes
- Editable Text (`sui-editable`) ‚Äî click-to-edit inline text, underline variant, sizes, save/cancel events
- Styled Select (`sui-styled-select`) ‚Äî custom dropdown replacement for native select, keyboard nav, sizes

### General
- Buttons (`sui-btn`) ‚Äî default, primary, success, danger, warning, info, outline, ghost, loading, sizes, icon, pill, block
- Button Group (`sui-btn-group`) ‚Äî horizontal/vertical connected buttons, sizes
- Cards (`sui-card`) ‚Äî raised, inset, flat, hoverable, image top, image overlay, horizontal, empty state
- Avatars (`sui-avatar`) ‚Äî circle, square, sizes, status dot, avatar group
- Badges (`sui-badge`) ‚Äî colors, pill, outline, sizes, positioned (notification dot)
- Chip (`sui-chip`) ‚Äî dismissible labels, colors, outline, sizes, avatars
- Copy Button (`sui-copy-btn`) ‚Äî click-to-copy with checkmark feedback
- Kbd (`sui-kbd`) ‚Äî keyboard shortcut display
- Divider (`sui-divider`) ‚Äî horizontal/vertical, groove, dashed, dotted, text, colors
- Pricing (`sui-pricing`) ‚Äî cards with feature lists, featured badge, billing toggle, selectable, inset
- Hero (`sui-hero`) ‚Äî landing page banners, sizes, raised, bordered, inset, gradient, accent line
- List Group (`sui-list-group`) ‚Äî styled lists with badges, avatars, actions, flyout sub-menus, active/disabled

### Data Display
- Stat Card (`sui-stat`) ‚Äî KPI display with value, label, trend arrow
- Tables (`sui-table`) ‚Äî striped, compact, bordered, borderless, hoverable
- Data Table (`sui-datatable`) ‚Äî sortable, searchable, filterable, paginated with styled select
- Chart (`sui-chart`) ‚Äî CSS bar/donut/pie + SVG line/area charts
- Radial Progress (`sui-radial`) ‚Äî circular ring with animated count-up, sizes, colors
- Timeline (`sui-timeline`) ‚Äî vertical events with dots, connectors, colors, icons
- Tree View (`sui-tree`) ‚Äî hierarchical tree with icons, lines, checkboxes
- Skeleton (`sui-skeleton`) ‚Äî loading placeholders with shimmer animation
- Descriptions (`sui-desc`) ‚Äî key-value displays, bordered, raised, inset, striped
- Countdown (`sui-countdown`) ‚Äî animated timer with years/days/hours/min/sec, relative dates (+2y5d), variants

### Feedback
- Alerts (`sui-alert`) ‚Äî default, filled, dismissible, with icon, all colors
- Toast (`SoftUI.toast()`) ‚Äî auto-dismissing notifications, 6 positions, colors, persistent
- Progress (`sui-progress`) ‚Äî default, striped, animated, indeterminate, sizes, colors, labels
- Spinner (`sui-spinner`) ‚Äî spin, grow, wobble, elastic, sizes, colors
- Loading Overlay (`sui-loading-overlay`) ‚Äî spinner variants, blur, text, colors, fullscreen
- Result (`sui-result`) ‚Äî full-page feedback states (success, error, warning, 404, info), inset

### Navigation
- Navbar (`sui-navbar`) ‚Äî sticky, compact, full-width, with links and actions
- Sidebar (`sui-sidebar`) ‚Äî collapsible, nav groups, icons, mobile responsive with overlay
- Breadcrumbs (`sui-breadcrumb`) ‚Äî navigation trail with separators
- Tabs (`sui-tabs`, `sui-tab`) ‚Äî inset track, pill, underlined, fill, justified
- Pagination (`sui-pagination`) ‚Äî page numbers, sizes
- Stepper (`sui-stepper`) ‚Äî numbered steps, completed/active/pending, vertical
- Dock (`sui-dock`) ‚Äî macOS-style icon bar with hover magnification
- Speed Dial (`sui-speed-dial`) ‚Äî floating action button with expandable actions
- Navigation Menu (`sui-nav-menu`) ‚Äî mega-menu dropdowns, icons, groups, sub-menus, hover/click
- Scrollspy (`sui-scrollspy`) ‚Äî auto-highlight nav on scroll, vertical, horizontal, pill

### Overlays
- Modal (`SoftUI.modal()`) ‚Äî sizes, scrollable, fullscreen, static backdrop, focus trap, escape to close
- Sheet (`SoftUI.sheet()`) ‚Äî slide from left/right/top/bottom, sizes, drawer with drag handle and snap points
- Dropdown (`sui-dropdown`) ‚Äî click to open, directions, split button, no-arrow modifier
- Popover (`sui-popover`) ‚Äî click-triggered floating content
- Hover Card (`sui-hover-card`) ‚Äî hover-triggered preview cards
- Tooltips (`sui-tooltip`) ‚Äî 4 directions, pure CSS
- Context Menu (`sui-context-menu`) ‚Äî right-click menus with submenus, checkboxes, keyboard nav
- Command Palette (`sui-command`) ‚Äî Cmd+K searchable command list with groups, icons, shortcuts
- Menubar (`sui-menubar`) ‚Äî horizontal menu bar with dropdowns

### Layout
- Layout (`sui-container`, `sui-row`, `sui-col-*`) ‚Äî 12-column grid, responsive breakpoints, gutters, offsets
- Scroll Area (`sui-scroll-area`) ‚Äî custom neumorphic scrollbar styling
- Accordion (`sui-accordion`) ‚Äî expand/collapse sections, single/multi-open
- Collapsible (`sui-collapsible`) ‚Äî single section expand/collapse
- Resizable (`sui-resizable`) ‚Äî drag-to-resize panels
- Drag & Drop (`sui-sortable`, `sui-kanban`) ‚Äî sortable lists, kanban board

### Media
- Carousel (`sui-carousel`) ‚Äî image/content slider, prev/next, dots, auto-play
- Image Lightbox (`sui-lightbox`) ‚Äî grid, filmstrip, gallery, captions, zoom
- Diff (`sui-diff`) ‚Äî image compare slider with labels, vertical mode
- Chat Bubble (`sui-chat`) ‚Äî message bubbles with avatar, timestamp, status
- Browser Mockup (`sui-browser`) ‚Äî macOS/Windows chrome with tabs
- Marquee (`sui-marquee`) ‚Äî infinite scrolling content, reverse, vertical
- Phone Mockup (`sui-phone`) ‚Äî notch, dynamic island, teardrop, punch hole
- Stack (`sui-stack`) ‚Äî overlapping cards with offset, fanned, hover spread
- Swap (`sui-swap`) ‚Äî animated toggle (rotate, flip, fade, slide)
- Text Rotate (`sui-text-rotate`) ‚Äî animated word cycling
- Tour (`SoftUI.tour()`) ‚Äî spotlight overlay with step-by-step tooltips
- Typewriter (`sui-typewriter`) ‚Äî character-by-character typing with cursor
- Toggle Group (`sui-toggle-group`) ‚Äî group of toggleable buttons

### Utilities
- Shadows: `sui-raised`, `sui-inset`, `sui-flat`, `sui-raised-sm`, `sui-raised-lg`
- Border Radius: `sui-radius-xs`, `sui-radius-sm`, `sui-radius`, `sui-radius-lg`, `sui-radius-full`
- Spacing: `sui-p-{0-5}`, `sui-m-{0-5}`, `sui-mt-*`, `sui-mb-*`, `sui-ml-*`, `sui-mr-*`, `sui-mx-auto`
- Text: `sui-text-center`, `sui-text-left`, `sui-text-right`, `sui-text-muted`, `sui-text-primary`, `sui-fw-bold`
- Flex: `sui-d-flex`, `sui-justify-center`, `sui-align-center`, `sui-flex-wrap`, `sui-gap-{0-5}`
- Display: `sui-d-block`, `sui-d-inline-block`, `sui-d-none`, `sui-d-grid`
- Position: `sui-position-relative`, `sui-position-absolute`, `sui-position-fixed`, `sui-position-sticky`
- Sizing: `sui-w-100`, `sui-h-100`, `sui-min-vh-100`
- Opacity: `sui-opacity-0` through `sui-opacity-100`
- Cursor: `sui-cursor-pointer`, `sui-cursor-not-allowed`, `sui-cursor-grab`
- Mask: `sui-mask-circle`, `sui-mask-star`, `sui-mask-heart`, `sui-mask-hexagon`, `sui-mask-diamond`, etc.
- Aspect Ratio: `sui-aspect-1-1`, `sui-aspect-16-9`, `sui-aspect-4-3`
- Typography: headings, lead text, blockquote, lists

## Theming

Override CSS custom properties to customize:
```css
:root {
  --sui-primary: #5B54E0;
  --sui-bg: #E4E9F0;
  --sui-bg-light: #EDF1F7;
  --sui-bg-dark: #D1D9E6;
  --sui-shadow-light: #FFFFFF;
  --sui-shadow-dark: #B8C0CC;
  --sui-text: #2D3748;
  --sui-text-muted: #5A6A7E;
  --sui-radius: 16px;
  --sui-radius-sm: 10px;
  --sui-font: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  --sui-transition-base: 0.25s;
}
```

Dark mode: add `data-theme="dark"` to the `<html>` element.

## JavaScript API

Interactive components use the global `SoftUI` object:
```js
SoftUI.modal('#myModal').open();
SoftUI.modal('#myModal').close();
SoftUI.sheet('#mySheet').open();
SoftUI.toast({ title: 'Success', message: 'Saved!', variant: 'success' });
SoftUI.tour([{ target: '#step1', title: 'Welcome', description: 'First step.' }]);
```

## When to Use SoftUI

Use SoftUI when you want:
- A distinctive neumorphic look that stands out from flat/material design
- A CSS library that works with any framework or plain HTML
- Dark mode that just works with one attribute
- Zero JavaScript dependencies for styling
- Accessible components that pass WCAG AA
- RTL support for international apps

Do not use SoftUI when:
- You need utility-first CSS (use Tailwind instead)
- You need React/Vue-specific typed components (use shadcn/ui or Chakra)
- Bundle size is critical and you only need 2-3 components (use individual CSS files)
